# Simple Screen Recorder

> Free Chrome extension for recording a browser tab, window, or screen with
> automatic click-to-zoom (Spotlight), browser-style frames, gradient or custom
> image backgrounds, timeline editing with trim, pause/resume, webcam-free
> workflow, and local WebM/MP4 export. No account, no watermark, and no cloud
> upload in the default workflow. Published by ikai design. Chrome Web Store:
> https://chromewebstore.google.com/detail/simple-screen-recorder/iohegjmhpfcldjhpjnafinbbjoaakooi

## Pages
- [Home](https://simple-screen-recorder.com/): features, how it works, FAQ, install link
- [Loom alternative](https://simple-screen-recorder.com/loom-alternative/): feature-by-feature comparison vs Loom
- [Screen Studio alternative](https://simple-screen-recorder.com/screen-studio-alternative/): comparison vs Screen Studio
- [Cap alternative](https://simple-screen-recorder.com/cap-alternative/): comparison vs Cap
- [Free Chrome extension](https://simple-screen-recorder.com/free-chrome-extension/): what's free and why
- [Blog](https://simple-screen-recorder.com/blog/): articles on screen recording and demo workflows
- [Privacy](https://simple-screen-recorder.com/privacy/): privacy policy
